articles.title: IMD issues weather alert: Delhi, Haryana to see thunderstorms with strong winds; heavy rain likely in J&K—check forecast
articles.description: The IMD forecasts isolated heavy rainfall in J&K and thunderstorms with strong winds in Himachal Pradesh, Punjab, Haryana, Chandigarh, Delhi and East Rajasthan on April 3-4. Active western disturbances may reportedly cause hailstorms and below-normal temperatures in northwest India this week.

topStories.description: King Charles and Queen Camilla will visit the US from 17 to 30 April, marking the first UK state visit since 2007. Insiders reveal that a private meeting between Charles and Prince Harry is being arranged in New York.

topStories.title: France Jails Four for Alleged Terrorism in Foiled BofA Bombing
topStories.description: French authorities have charged and jailed an adult and three teens aged 16 to 17 over a foiled bombing attempt near the Bank of America Corp. office in Paris that was seen as possible retaliation for the war with Iran.

topStories.description: The Senate unanimously approved a bipartisan deal funding most of DHS except ICE and Border Patrol, moving to end the 48-day shutdown standoff.

topStories.description: St. Louis Cardinals shortstop Masyn Winn was involved in a single-car crash hours after he hit a walk-off single against the New York Mets on Wednesday.

dailyNews.title: Does marijuana cause lung cancer? Doctors reveal what the research says
dailyNews.description: New research suggests heavy marijuana smoking may raise the risk of lung cancer risk, as well as head and neck cancer. Research has also linked nicotine-based vaping to cancer risk.

dailyNews.description: Tiger Woods has formally declined the Ryder Cup captaincy as he steps away from golf following a DUI arrest near his Jupiter Island, Florida home, where his SUV flipped.

dailyNews.description: Former Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene said in a post on X that all she heard in President Donald Trump's Wednesday night address "was WAR WAR WAR."

dailyNews.title: Yankees enter rare company as team stays dominant behind Cam Schlittler
dailyNews.description: The New York Yankees have allowed the third-fewest runs to start an MLB season as the team defeated the Seattle Mariners on Wednesday night, 5-3.

dailyNews.title: Coin used as bus fare turns out to be 2,000-year-old relic, its journey still a mystery
dailyNews.description: After its ancient origins were finally discovered, a 2,000-year-old Carthaginian coin unknowingly used as bus fare in England was donated to Leeds Museums.

dailyNews.description: We have takeaways from the president’s address to the nation.

dailyNews.title: Oil prices rise after Trump insists the Iran war is going to plan
dailyNews.description: One market analyst says Trump warning the Iran war will take 2-3 more weeks, without a plan to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, "was far less than" investors had hoped for.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iran war will wrap up "very shortly," but warns of more strikes in coming weeks
dailyNews.description: President Trump said in a speech that the U.S. will complete its military mission in Iran "very shortly," and that U.S. forces have achieved "overwhelming victories."

dailyNews.title: Iran war's "core strategic objectives are nearing completion," Trump says
dailyNews.description: Trump says he expects the U.S. war with Iran to end within several weeks despite unrelenting attacks from both sides and Iran's iron grip on the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: DNC and top Democratic leaders sue Trump over mail-in voting executive order
dailyNews.description: A coalition of major Democratic groups sued the Trump administration, seeking to strike down an executive order that would exert more federal influence over mail-in voting — including by creating lists of citizens who are eligible to vote.

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. 'nearing completion' of its strategic objectives in Iran
dailyNews.description: In his address to the nation, President Trump said that the U.S. is “nearing completion” of its strategic objectives in Iran, but did not offer specifics about when he would consider those objectives met.

dailyNews.title: 'We had to do it ourselves': Trump forges ahead in Iran without traditional U.S. allies
dailyNews.description: In his prime-time speech, President Donald Trump argued that the U.S. had to act on its own to neutralize the threat from Iran because many of America’s allies wouldn’t help.

dailyNews.title: Despite Trump's claims, there's no indication Iran's regime has lost power, Western officials and experts say
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump said in his address to the nation on Wednesday night that regime change has occurred in Iran because all of the country's original leaders are dead

dailyNews.title: Trump's Iran threats alarm war crimes experts
dailyNews.description: Donald Trump risks turning America into a "rogue state," a former U.S. ambassador for war crimes issues warned after the president threatened to bomb power stations and desalination plants in Iran.
